metadata.title:
CASE Of KILL


Or Be KILLED

pages.raw_text:
U. s. Marshal Pray, of this city,
has filed his report of the attempt
to arrest Dan Stafford of Colville
on a charge Of selling liquor to In
dians. The report is laconic and
simply says that Stafford is not in
custody because it was necessary
to kill him.


The shooting took place on Stat
ford's ranch on the Columbia riv-
err. The offense was committed at
Reardon, but the officer was given
the slip. Knowing that Stafford had
ranch on the Columbia, Pray
went to it and surprised his man.


Mrs. Stafford threw herself in
front of her husband as he reach
ed for his pistol on sight of the
marshal. Pray had also reached
for his gun, but before he could
draw a bead on his man, the pro-
tecting form Of Mrs. Stafford was
between them.


But she was excited and stepped
away Both men again tried to
shoot, but the marshaIs bullet was
the quicker. Stafford was shot
through the breast Pray was ex-
onerated by a coroner's jury.
